message:
fix(error): change InvalidPriority field from i32 to String

Preserves the original user input in error messages instead of
discarding non-numeric values or replacing them with sentinel -1.
Parse errors now show exactly what the user typed, improving
diagnostic quality for structured error hints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
